title: Lebanon Day 25: 51 killed in 24 hours including infant and 2 medics — 552 total since ceasefire
snippet: The Lebanese Health Ministry said Israeli attacks over 24 hours killed 51 people, including 2 medical workers and an infant. Total killed since April 16 ceasefire: 552. Since March 2: nearly 3,000 killed, 1.2 million displaced. UN reports 103 Lebanese medical workers killed and 230 injured in 130+ Israeli strikes. Israel targeted 30+ locations with evacuation warnings for 7 south Lebanon towns and 2 Bekaa villages. Hezbollah claimed 20+ attacks on Israeli military targets in retaliation.
tag_reason: New day (Day 25) casualty data — 51 vs yesterday's 39, new medic/infant casualties, new cumulative total (552), new 30+ location strikes with evacuation warnings
